Off Calendar Aug-11-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Deaktor appeared by zoom for Jeffrey A. Goldman, Steven Goldman and Mary Anne Forman (Co-Administrators).
Elina Protich appeared by telephone for Jami Katz.

The Court stated that it looked at the settlement agreement, that CCP 664.4 is tricky, that the parties are requesting that the Court retain jurisdiction of the settlement, referred to page 4 paragraph 7 of the settlement agreement and noted that all parties initialed the paragraph. Counsel confirmed that all parties initialed the paragraph. The Court granted the
First and Final Account and Report of Administrators, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Distribution Or In The Alternative Confirmation Of Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Oct-21-2019 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Jami Hendelman Katz.
Michael Deaktor for Objectors.

Ms. Calhoun stated she filed a status report on Friday, that they suggested the matter be put off to November and that they couldn't agree on a date. Ms. Calhoun also stated that she has subpoenaed Schwab and Merill Lynch, that she has done a document production request and that she may take depositions. Mr. Deaktor stated that discovery is ready to go, that he has a box of documents and that he will get it to Ms. Calhoun. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 31, 2020. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by February 7, 2020. The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Distribution, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on February 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Continued To Oct-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrators and the Attorney to appear on October 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not taken action to increase bond. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Deaktor appeared by telephone for Jeffrey Goldman, Steve Goldman and Mary Forman (Petitioners).

Mr. Deaktor stated that he is not aware of anyone objecting to the petition and that they are asking for the order for probate filed on January 30, 2019 to be vacated because Mary's name was left off of the order. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration The (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
